description_long: This is a lifelike representation of a male Mallard duck, characterized by its iridescent green head, yellow bill, and a white ring around its neck. The body is robust and rounded, with a brownish-gray chest and lighter gray sides, while the back and tail are darker. The wings are tucked neatly against the body, and the legs and webbed feet are a vivid orange. The eyes are dark and alert, and the beak is slightly curved downward. The plumage shows subtle gradations of color and texture, giving a realistic impression of feathers. The overall form is naturalistic, capturing the typical stance and proportions of a standing duck.
description: A realistic male Mallard duck with a green head, yellow bill, and orange webbed feet, standing upright with detailed feather textures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green head, yellow bill, and symmetrical chest with both orange feet visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the iridescent green head, yellow bill, and the full profile of the body and tail.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the broad back, wing outlines, and the symmetry of the body and tail.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the green head, yellow bill, and the body profile with one foot slightly forward.
